problem: POSIX shell `source .env` fails when values contain unquoted PEM lines or raw newlines — multiline secrets are not bash-safe unless quoted or escaped.

python_path.note: Repository `.env` may use \n escapes for PEM — dotenv parses these; bash source does not.

shell_operators.avoid: sourcing raw .env with embedded multiline PEM
prefer: Export from a file: export COINBASE_API_PRIVATE_KEY="$(cat secrets/coinbase_ec.pem)"
Or single-line PEM in .env with \n only, loaded by Python dotenv — not by bash source

scripts_policy: Do not add `source .env` to shell scripts that must support arbitrary PEM; use Python driver or explicit exports from files.
